pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if the build environment enforces JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use Java 21 source/target and set up annotation processors for Lombok and MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without configuring the compiler plugin for Java 21 and adding annotation processor paths, the project will fail to compile if it uses Java 21 features or if MapStruct/Lombok annotations are not processed correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-surefire-plugin with JVM arguments required for JDK 21 testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: JDK 21 requires explicit enabling of dynamic agent loading for certain testing frameworks (like Mockito) to function correctly; without this flag, tests may fail at runtime with IllegalAccessError or similar security exceptions.
